title: Chaos Minecraft
body:
## Making Minecraft chaotic by changing some gameplays.

<details>
<summary>Loot Tables</summary>

#### Mob drops
  - Pigs drop nothing
  - Bats drop porkchops
  - Squids kill by players may drop enchanted golden apples (0.9%) (0.5+)
  - Ravanger killed by player drop 10-25 beef (0.8+)
#### Blocks
  - Diamond Ores drop Emeralds
  - Iron Ores drop Lapis Lazulies (0.5+)
  - Dead brushes drop Cobblestones
  - Stone drop Netherrack
#### Archaeology (0.6+)
  - Add Zombie Head to Desert Pyramid and Warm Ocean Ruins
  - Add Skeleton Skull to Desert Well
  - Add Rotten Flesh to Warm Ocean Ruins
#### Gameplay (0.6+)
  - Fishing have a chance to get nausea suspicious stew
  - Cat morning gift have a chance to give op gears along with bone and skull
  - Piglin bartering might give 2 milk buckets

</details>
<details>
<summary>Recipes</summary>

#### Crafting
  - Gold Ingot require 8 Gold Nuggets and 1 Copper Ingot (0.5+)
  - New Suspicious Stew recipe give nausea effect made by Red Mushroom, Brown Mushroom and 3 Pufferfishes (0.6.1+)
#### Furnace
  - Iron Ores smelt into stone (0.5+)
  - Gold Ores and Raw Gold smelt into Cactus (0.5+)
  - Deepslate Diamond Ores smelt into Coal (0.5+)
  - Diamond Ores smelt into Bamboo (0.5+)
#### Blast furnace
  - Coal Block smelt 30 minutes into Diamond
  - Iron Ores smelt into Stone (0.5+)
  - Gold Ores and Raw Gold smelt into Cactus (0.5+)
  - Deepslate Diamond Ores smelt into Coal (0.5+)
  - Diamond Ores smelt into Stick (0.5+)
#### Brewing
  - Milk Bucket use as brewing fuel instead of Blaze Powders (0.6.1+)

</details>
<details>
<summary>Mob Spawning</summary>

- Ravager spawn naturally
- Chickens spawn often in the nether
- Elder guardian could be found at the beach
- Cows can only be found in jungle biomes
- Sheep spawn in the deep dark
- You may find some donkeys in the end
- Ghast spawn in the void
- Pig spawn in Crimson forest (0.8+)
- Camel spawn in Jagged Peaks (0.8+)
- Blacks wolf can only spawn when moon in the new moon. Otherwide Striped wolf spawn instead.= (0.8+)

</details>
<details>
<summary>Mob Behaviors (0.6.1+)</summary>
  
- Villagers pick up armors
- Piglins love grass (short grass, tall grass, seagrass and grass block) (0.7+)
- Axolotls hunt wolves (0.7+)
- Add fishes and rotten flesh to axolotl food (0.7+)
- Add raw beef to parrot food (0.7+)
- Turtles eat cookies (0.7+)
  
</details>
<details>
<summary>Enchantments (0.6+)</summary>
  
- Player is sensitive to Impaling enchantment 
- Wind Burst can be apply to sword and axe
- Wind Burst can active even just standing on the ground (0.7+)
- Density and Breach no longer incompatible

</details>

<details>
<summary>Trial Spawner (0.8+)</summary>

#### When Normal

- Stray spawner will spawn is upside down Stray (Custom name Grumm and unvisible).
- Baby Zombie spawner will spawn upside down Chicken Jockey which should be 
- Slime spawner sometimes spawn a frog.

#### When Ominous

- Breeze will have oozing effect for 3 mins.
- Zombie spawner will only spawn baby zombie.
- Spider spawner will only spawn spider jokey with punch I power I bow.
- Skeleton spawner will spawn Skeleton Horseman punch I power I bow.
- Baby Zombie Spawner will spawn Baby Zombie with Diamond Helmet and Knockback 1 Diamond Sword/Sharpness 1 Iron Sword riding Baby Hoglin.
- Cave Spider have Cow death lootable.
- Bogged spawner will spawn 4-bogged stack.

</details>


<details>
<summary>Others</summary>
  
#### World generations
  - Nether has no ceiling now
  - The End is flat (0.5+)
  - Shipwreck spawn on mountains (0.6+)
#### Others
  - Emerald, Iron, Gold, Diamond and Netherite Blocks  can be transform into mud (0.7+)
  - Beacons use Netherite Ingots, Nether Star, Diamond, Ender Eyes and Wither Roses as payment (0.7+)
  - Withers can be summon with dirt base blocks, soul soils or bedrocks (0.7+)
  - The Nether have rain (0.5 ONLY)
  - The End have rain (0.6+)
  - Try to locate Monument in the End might cause your game to freeze (0.5+)
  - Bed don't blow up in nether and the end but in overworld
  - Respawn anchor doesn't work in any dimension
  - Piglin does not transform in the end.
  - Zombie villagers spawn in normal village and regular villagers spawn in abandoned village

</details>

So I don't know who would want to play this 'cuz I made this just for fun. It's a part of the chaotic of mine who made this. But anyway, **THANK YOU FOR DOWNLOADING**, I'm appreciate it. I had fun making this stuff and I hope you having fun playing this chaotic Minecraft thingy as well. ♥
